title: MessageBatch
description: A message batch object representing an asynchronous batch of message requests.

id.description: Unique identifier for the message batch.

processing_status.description: The processing status of the batch.

request_counts.description: Tallies of requests by their status within the batch.

ended_at.description: RFC 3339 datetime when the batch ended processing.

created_at.description: RFC 3339 datetime when the batch was created.

expires_at.description: RFC 3339 datetime when the batch results will expire.

results_url.description: URL to retrieve the batch results. Available when the batch is complete.
